source: Agent kit-knowledge pass, grounded in each hero's ability + passive text from data/game-data/hero-abilities.json.
note: THEORY: qualitative kit reads for coaching — archetype, core combo, win condition, power spike, passive's in-fight effect, who to play WITH, and how to play AGAINST. Not sim output; a structured read of the kit text. powerSpike/scaling in {early,mid,late}; waveClear/dive in {low,med,high}.

gideon.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
gideon.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
gideon.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
gideon.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
gideon.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

yurei.combo: Anima Burst / Whispering Echoes apply Soul Rip → Severance resets on Soul-Ripped targets → Soulstorm pulls them in
yurei.winCondition: chain Severance resets to stick to a target and burst in melee
yurei.passive: casting grants ranged empowered basics + attack speed
yurei.playWith: follow-up CC to hold the target she dashes onto
yurei.playAgainst: her chain needs Soul Rip resets — peel/disengage breaks it; punish when Severance is on cooldown

drongo.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
drongo.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
drongo.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
drongo.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

grux.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
grux.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
grux.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
grux.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
grux.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

renna.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
renna.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
renna.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
renna.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
renna.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

howitzer.combo: Slow Grenades / Land Mine zone → R2000 Missile → Make It Rain ult
howitzer.winCondition: wall off space with mines/grenades and rain artillery on a held enemy
howitzer.playWith: CC and chokes that force enemies into his zones
howitzer.playAgainst: immobile turret — flank his mine zones, dive when ult is down

murdock.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
murdock.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
murdock.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
murdock.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
murdock.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

rampage.combo: Pounce → Rumble slow → Boulder Throw → Behemoth ult to brawl
rampage.winCondition: engage with Pounce, grow with Behemoth and out-sustain the fight
rampage.passive: ramping health regen for jungle sustain
rampage.playWith: follow-up damage while he front-lines and CCs
rampage.playAgainst: anti-heal and kiting beat his sustain brawl; burst him before Behemoth

crunch.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
crunch.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
crunch.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
crunch.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
crunch.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

muriel.combo: Alacrity shield+AS → Consecrated Ground bubble → Reversal global save
muriel.winCondition: keep the carry alive with global shields and enable their damage
muriel.passive: abilities grant Sentinel to allies; on-hit bonus
muriel.playAgainst: she has no damage threat — dive her carry through the shields or pick her first

sevarog.combo: Phantom Rush → Subjugate root → Siphon → Colossal Blow
sevarog.winCondition: stack Souls to snowball Siphon and lock down with the root
sevarog.passive: ability kills grant permanent Soul stacks (HP + damage)
sevarog.playWith: a team that converts his root into kills
sevarog.playAgainst: deny his last-hits early to starve Souls; dodge the slow Subjugate

wraith.combo: Peekaboo! mark+slow → Knock, Knock! sniper → Back It Up! displacement ult
wraith.winCondition: land long-range snipes on marked targets and reset on takedowns
wraith.playWith: engage that holds a target in his sniper line
wraith.playAgainst: close the gap — he's weak point-blank; dodge the skillshot snipe

kwang.combo: Judgement tether → Surge knockup → Fury of the Heavens slow, recall the blade
kwang.winCondition: tether a target, knock up and brawl with energized basics
kwang.playWith: follow-up while he tethers and knocks up
kwang.playAgainst: bait his blade-recall mobility, then punish when it's placed

wukong.combo: Windsurge engage → Cyclebreaker damage-reduction spin → clones from 84000 Hairs
wukong.winCondition: stance-dance for damage or tankiness and overwhelm with clones
wukong.playWith: a team that fights alongside his clones
wukong.playAgainst: AoE clears his clones; CC him during the damage-reduction window

akeron.combo: Web Lash root → Crushing Maw armor shred → Hellfire eye → Consume pull-channel
akeron.winCondition: root with Web Lash and grind with Hunger-stacked haste
akeron.playWith: follow-up burst on his rooted target
akeron.playAgainst: dodge Web Lash — without the root he has no lock-down; interrupt Consume

the-fey.combo: Bramble Patch slow → Harvest Nettles stacks → Untamed Growth DoT → Fly Trap pull ult
the-fey.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
the-fey.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
the-fey.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
the-fey.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy — dive her

grim-exe.combo: Energy Shield block → Displacement Blast → Assault Mode → GTFO lockon ult
grim-exe.winCondition: out-trade with Pulsefire and the spell-shield, finish with GTFO
grim-exe.playWith: peel so he can free-cast in Assault Mode
grim-exe.playAgainst: bait Energy Shield, then commit; dodge GTFO's slow channel

yin.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
yin.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
yin.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
yin.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

khaimera.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
khaimera.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
khaimera.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
khaimera.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

feng-mao.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
feng-mao.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
feng-mao.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
feng-mao.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
feng-mao.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing the key CC

gadget.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
gadget.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
gadget.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
gadget.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
gadget.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

narbash.combo: Thunk stun → March! speed → Song heal aura → Crash Bang Boom! AoE slow ult
narbash.winCondition: engage with Thunk and group-buff the team through fights
narbash.playWith: a dive team that rides his speed and heal
narbash.playAgainst: dodge/cleanse Thunk; he's low-damage — kill his carry through the aura

sparrow.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
sparrow.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
sparrow.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
sparrow.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

lt-belica.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
lt-belica.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
lt-belica.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

zinx.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
zinx.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
zinx.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
zinx.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

boris.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
boris.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
boris.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
boris.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

phase.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
phase.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
phase.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
phase.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
phase.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

bayle.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
bayle.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
bayle.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
bayle.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps

twinblast.combo: Vortex Grenade → Vaporize pierce → Rocket Dash reposition → Ventilate ult
twinblast.winCondition: reposition with Rocket Dash and unload Ventilate from safety
twinblast.passive: abilities grant AS + a triple-shot next basic
twinblast.playWith: a frontline to create his free-fire window
twinblast.playAgainst: he's mobile but squishy — CC through the dash, then burst

zarus.combo: Evade in → Barricade block → Spear of Nyr (execute <20%) → Coliseum ult arena
zarus.winCondition: trap a target in Coliseum and out-duel with stacked Gladiator
zarus.playWith: a team that joins him inside the Coliseum
zarus.playAgainst: don't fight him in his arena — disengage; burst through Barricade's window

revenant.combo: Scar mark → Obliterate homing missiles → Reckoning 1v1 realm ult
revenant.winCondition: Reckoning a target into the Nether Realm and crit them down 1v1
revenant.playWith: a team to clean up if his 1v1 stalls
revenant.playAgainst: the ult is a 1v1 — peel the realmed ally can't help, so don't be caught alone; he's crit-reliant early-weak

maco.combo: Maco Gift! (heal ally / hurt enemy) → Maco Fly! slam → Maco Strike! charged line ult
maco.winCondition: poke and heal-flex while landing the charged ult
maco.playAgainst: dodge the charged Strike; pressure his low survivability

dekker.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
dekker.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
dekker.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
dekker.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
dekker.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

terra.combo: Wild Rush charge → Ruthless Assault → Highland Hurl slow → Unstoppable Force cleanse ult
terra.winCondition: engage Unstoppable and grind with Hersir-empowered swings
terra.passive: Hersir stacks empower the next basic
terra.playAgainst: save CC for after Unstoppable Force; kite her charge

riktor.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
riktor.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
riktor.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
riktor.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

kira.combo: Mercy poke → stack Vengeance → Shadow Glide reposition → Purge ult
kira.winCondition: stack Vengeance and shred with the channeled Purge
kira.playWith: peel so she can channel Purge safely
kira.playAgainst: interrupt/CC her during Purge; punish her short dash cooldown

serath.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
serath.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
serath.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
serath.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

countess.combo: Shadow Slip in → Eventide → Blade Siphon → Feast suppress ult, Haemorrhage true-damage
countess.winCondition: Feast-suppress a squishy and delete them with true-damage burst
countess.passive: two-ability hits apply a %max-HP true-damage bleed
countess.playWith: a team to clean up after her pick
countess.playAgainst: Feast is her whole engage — bait it / peel; she's fragile, punish the recast window

shinbi.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
shinbi.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
shinbi.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

iggy-scorch.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
iggy-scorch.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
iggy-scorch.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
iggy-scorch.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

mourn.combo: Abduct pull → Contagion ally-heal bugs → Beguile damage-reduction → Eclipse vision-denial ult
mourn.winCondition: pull a target in and sustain the team through the brawl
mourn.playWith: burst that punishes his pulled target
mourn.playAgainst: respect the long Abduct channel/range; anti-heal blunts Contagion

skylar.combo: Plasma Grenade → Hypercharge on-hit → Air Assault reposition → Atomiser ult
skylar.winCondition: Hypercharge and kite-shoot from Air Assault safety
skylar.passive: extra jump; kills cause corpse explosions
skylar.playWith: a frontline so she can free-fire airborne
skylar.playAgainst: CC her out of Air Assault; she's squishy on the ground

morigesh.combo: Mark a target → Hive slow → Swarm reposition → Curse execute-burst ult
morigesh.winCondition: Mark + Curse a squishy and delete them with %max-HP Pestilence
morigesh.playWith: setup that holds her marked target
morigesh.playAgainst: she's squishy with one escape (Swarm) — dive after it's used; spread vs Hive

eden.combo: stance-swap with Zero Shift → Tachyon Lance (ranged) or melee chain → Limit Break on Overheat
eden.winCondition: build Heat and burst with Limit Break, flexing range and melee
eden.passive: damage builds Heat → Overheat unlocks Limit Break
eden.playWith: peel that lets her ramp Heat safely
eden.playAgainst: pressure her before Overheat; CC during the melee stance

greystone.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
greystone.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
greystone.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
greystone.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

argus.combo: Dread Nova stun → Ether Crystal push/lift → Particle Shredder channel → Synaptic Obliterator beams
argus.winCondition: poke from max range and zone with the crystal
argus.playWith: a frontline to protect his stationary channel
argus.playAgainst: dodge Dread Nova; dive him during the immobile ult channel

kallari.combo: Shadow Walk stealth → Crippling Dagger slow → Shadow Dance gap-close → Guillotine execute ult
kallari.winCondition: stealth-pick an isolated squishy and execute with Guillotine
kallari.passive: Death Mark detonates for bonus burst
kallari.playWith: a team that follows her pick
kallari.playAgainst: ward/reveal for the stealth; she's the squishiest hero — any CC kills her

aurora.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
aurora.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
aurora.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
aurora.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

steel.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
steel.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
steel.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
steel.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam
